name: Is occupational illness comp different from regular workers comp in Utah?
description: Yes, ODA for diseases vs. WCA for injuries.[1]

mainEntity.name: Is occupational illness comp different from regular workers comp in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, ODA for diseases vs. WCA for injuries.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, Utah's ODA handles diseases separately from WCA injuries, with distinct exclusivity rules.[1] WCA excludes diseases; ODA excludes accidents.[1] Key factors: classify as disease (e.g., lead poisoning) for ODA path, no intentional tort extension yet.[1] Understand split to file correctly; misclassification causes denials.
